revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure

{{citation needed|はいしされたしせつ}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|はいしされたしせつ}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:廃止された施設}} {{translated page|ja|Category:廃止された施設|version=104137949}} {{translated page|ja|廃止された施設|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:廃止された施設|comment=did a replacement}} [[ja:Category:廃止された施設]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:廃止された交通施設]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] {{wikidata link|Q9646380}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Facilities]] [[Category:Former entities]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
